cumulative_transcript.speaker: Agent
cumulative_transcript.text: Hello Anandi ji, this is Rohan from Hathway Broadband. How are you today, sir?

slow_thinking_rationale: At 6s: No policy violations detected yet. Conversation appears normal, continuing to monitor for suspicious activity.

scenario_info.description: A scammer calls and says they are from the user's [INTERNET_PROVIDER]. They claim that to comply with new government regulations, all users must link their Aadhaar to their broadband account. They direct the user to a phishing website to enter their Aadhaar number and the OTP received on their phone.
